---
id: list-call-detail-records
title: "List Call Detail Records"
description: "Returns CDRs for the specified domain the caller is allowed to access."
sidebar_label: "List Call Detail Records"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/v1/fs-pbx-api
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List Call Detail Records"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/domains/{domain_uuid}/cdrs"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns CDRs for the specified domain the caller is allowed to access.

Access rules:
- Caller must have access to the target domain (domain scope).
- Caller must have the `xml_cdr_view` permission.

Pagination (cursor-based):
- Both `limit` and `starting_after` are optional.
- If `limit` is not provided, it defaults to 500.
- If `starting_after` is not provided, results start from the beginning.
- If `has_more` is true, request the next page by passing `starting_after`
  equal to the last item's `xml_cdr_uuid` from the previous response.

Optional filters:
- `search` matches caller/destination fields and status.
- `direction` filters by call direction.
- `status` filters by call status.
  Accepted values: `answered`, `no answer`, `cancelled`, `voicemail`,
  `missed call`, `abandoned`.
- `extension_uuid` filters by extension UUID.
- `call_center_queue_uuid` filters by queue UUID.
- `date_from` and `date_to` filter by `start_epoch` in epoch seconds.

Examples:
- First page: `GET /api/v1/domains/{domain_uuid}/cdrs`
- Next page:  `GET /api/v1/domains/{domain_uuid}/cdrs?starting_after={last_xml_cdr_uuid}`
- Custom size: `GET /api/v1/domains/{domain_uuid}/cdrs?limit=25`
- Search: `GET /api/v1/domains/{domain_uuid}/cdrs?search=2135551212`
- Date range (epoch): `GET /api/v1/domains/{domain_uuid}/cdrs?date_from=1775001600&date_to=1775087999`

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"in":"query","name":"limit","description":"Optional. Number of results to return (min 1, max 500). Defaults to 500.","example":500,"required":false,"schema":{"type":"integer","description":"Optional. Number of results to return (min 1, max 500). Defaults to 500.","example":500}},{"in":"query","name":"starting_after","description":"Optional. Return results after this CDR UUID (cursor).","example":"c0ec8113-aa15-40ac-8437-47185dd9dcf4","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","description":"Optional. Return results after this CDR UUID (cursor).","example":"c0ec8113-aa15-40ac-8437-47185dd9dcf4"}},{"in":"query","name":"search","description":"Optional. Search caller name, numbers, SIP Call-ID, and status.","example":"2135551212","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","description":"Optional. Search caller name, numbers, SIP Call-ID, and status.","example":"2135551212"}},{"in":"query","name":"direction","description":"Optional. Filter by direction.","example":"inbound","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","description":"Optional. Filter by direction.","example":"inbound"}},{"in":"query","name":"status","description":"Optional. Filter by status. Accepted values: answered, no answer, cancelled, voicemail, missed call, abandoned.","example":"answered","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","description":"Optional. Filter by status. Accepted values: answered, no answer, cancelled, voicemail, missed call, abandoned.","example":"answered"}},{"in":"query","name":"extension_uuid","description":"Optional. Filter by extension UUID.","example":"c9a76140-0ca4-4ea3-95af-7e12c2ff0df5","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","description":"Optional. Filter by extension UUID.","example":"c9a76140-0ca4-4ea3-95af-7e12c2ff0df5"}},{"in":"query","name":"call_center_queue_uuid","description":"Optional. Filter by queue UUID.","example":"89ea1ec3-44f8-4705-8f2c-f9769486f9f1","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","description":"Optional. Filter by queue UUID.","example":"89ea1ec3-44f8-4705-8f2c-f9769486f9f1"}},{"in":"query","name":"date_from","description":"Optional. Start of date range in epoch seconds (UTC).","example":1775001600,"required":false,"schema":{"type":"integer","description":"Optional. Start of date range in epoch seconds (UTC).","example":1775001600}},{"in":"query","name":"date_to","description":"Optional. End of date range in epoch seconds (UTC).","example":1775087999,"required":false,"schema":{"type":"integer","description":"Optional. End of date range in epoch seconds (UTC).","example":1775087999}},{"in":"path","name":"domain_uuid","description":"The domain UUID.","example":"4018f7a3-8e0a-47bb-9f4f-04b1313e0e1b","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>
